reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Identified potential issues with the current design, including overprovisioned limits and synchronous throttling. Suggested exploring alternative approaches, such as using BPF to implement limit enforcement.

2026-03-07.patch_summary: A proposal to redesign memory cgroups (memcg_ext) with a focus on existing challenges and issues, including overprovisioned limits, synchronous throttling, and protection limit enforcement.
